findings.description: The HTML table omits the row for case LV-2013-0014 that appears in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF first page shows row: "LV-2013-0014 | Town of Star - Star WWTP | NC0058548 | Montgomery | Fayetteville | 0.6 | 9-2012 | 01/28/13 | $175.00 | $125.00 | $300.00 | 3". In the HTML, after PC-2013-0002 the next row is "DV-2013-0005", and no LV-2013-0014 row is present.

findings.description: The HTML misstates a total penalties value for case LV-2013-0012.
findings.evidence: PDF row for "LV-2013-0012 Aqua North Carolina Inc - Mallard Crossing WWTP" shows Penalty Amount "$200.00", Enforcement Costs "$27.13", and Total Penalties "$227.13". HTML shows the same row with Total Penalties "$200.00", which does not match the PDF and changes the meaning.

findings.description: The HTML misstates a total penalties value for case MV-2013-0003.
findings.evidence: PDF row for "MV-2013-0003 Carolina Water Service Inc of North Carolina - Willowbrook WWTP" shows Penalty Amount "$200.00", Enforcement Costs "$27.13", and Total Penalties "$227.13". HTML shows Total Penalties "$200.00".

findings.description: The HTML contains an incorrect case count total at the end of the table.
findings.evidence: PDF second page footer states "Total Cases: 40". The HTML also states "Total Cases: 40", but the HTML table body contains only 39 data rows because the LV-2013-0014 row is missing.

findings.description: The HTML does not use heading elements to represent the document title/header structure.
findings.evidence: PDF has a clear title centered at top of each page: "DWQ January 2013 Civil Penalty Assessments". HTML renders this as a plain div with class "page-header" and contains no h1-h6 headings.
